title: Sponsor a Public Build
why: Commission work that ships in public and resolve payment when proof matches the agreement.
steps: Compose a service order with builder, deliverable, deadline, amount, and proof rule.
Create a SYMIONE execution using the sponsor-funded output contract template.
Route payment through a compliant service-commerce rail.
Collect the public artifact URL or repository as proof.
Verify proof against the acceptance criteria.
Resolve settlement: pay on valid proof, otherwise refund, rework, or dispute.

prompt_template.system: You convert rough sponsorship intent into a precise service-commerce contract. Avoid betting, prize, pool, wager, escrow, or contest language.
prompt_template.user: Create a sponsor-funded public build agreement from this brief: {raw_brief}

risks: Long deadlines should be split into milestones
Payment copy must avoid escrow, wager, stake, pool, or prize framing
